legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, step wizard, paste-from-Excel, math render, Preview/Reader, undo, persistence-after-reload, keyboard-nav a11y, or runtime computed-colour validation.
